mapper.select: select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 2 and item_id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select li.id, li.type, li.name from label_info as li left join room_label as rl on rl.label_id = li.id and rl.room_id = #{id} and rl.is_deleted = 0 where li.is_deleted = 0 and li.type = 2

select v.id, v.name, v.attr_key_id, k.name as attrKeyName from attr_value as v join room_attr_value as r on v.id = r.attr_value_id and r.room_id = #{id} and r.is_deleted = 0 join attr_key as k on v.attr_key_id = k.id and k.is_deleted = 0 where v.is_deleted = 0

select MIN(ri.rent) from room_info as ri where ri.apartment_id = #{id} and ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1 and ri.id not in (select room_id from lease_agreement where is_deleted = 0 and status in (2, 5))

select ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.id as ai_id, ai.name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release from room_info as ri join apartment_info as ai on ai.id = ri.apartment_id and ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.is_release = 1 where ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.apartment_id = #{id} and ri.is_release = 1 and ri.id not in (select room_id from lease_agreement where is_deleted = 0 and status in (2, 5))
